defect: crushed or excessively long flex duct
prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Duct installation, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: crushed or excessively long flex duct. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Duct installation (residential job)
